name: Sun Summit Minerals Corp.
summary: Sun Summit Minerals Corp. engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of precious metal properties in Mexico and Canada. It primarily explores for gold, silver, copper, lead, zinc, and molybdenum deposits. The company has an option to acquire 100% interest in the Buck property covering an area of approximately 33,000 hectares located in north-central British Columbia. It also holds 100% interest in the Chunibas, Suzanne, 1068, La Caridad Este, San Martin, La Gloria, Espiritu SMR, and the Los Ocotes projects, as well as in Mariana Project located in Mexico. The company was formerly known as San Marco Resources Inc. and changed its name to Sun Summit Minerals Corp. in November 2020. Sun Summit Minerals Corp. was incorporated in 2005 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
